title: koeleria rodriguez-graciae
intro: Koeleria rodriguez-graciae, also known as Rodriguez-Gracia's Koeleria, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula in Western Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Koeleria rodriguez-graciae can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
